lessons.title: Creating Custom Types 🏗️
lessons.description: Stop relying on basic Strings and Ints. Build your own complex data!

lessons.title: Properties (The Data) 📝
lessons.description: Give your Structs variables to securely hold their unique information.

lessons.title: Methods (The Actions) 🏃‍♂️
lessons.description: Give your Structs functions so they can actually DO things.

lessons.title: Computed Properties 🧮
lessons.description: Variables that instantly calculate their own value when you ask for it.

lessons.title: Mutating Methods 🧬
lessons.description: How a Struct can change its own internal data safely.
